pokemon:spritzee.name: Spritzee
pokemon:spritzee.summary: In the past, rather than using perfume, royal ladies carried a Spritzee that would waft a fragrance they liked.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: In the past, rather than using perfume, royal ladies carried a Spritzee that would waft a fragrance they liked.
It emits a scent that enraptures those who smell it. This fragrance changes depending on what it has eaten.
The scent its body gives off enraptures those who smell it. Noble ladies had no shortage of love for Spritzee.
A scent pouch within this Pokémon’s body allows it to create various scents. A change in its diet will alter the fragrance it produces.
It emits a scent that enraptures those who smell it. This fragrance changes depending on what it has eaten.
In the past, rather than using perfume, royal ladies carried a Spritzee that would waft a fragrance they liked.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: In the past, rather than using perfume, royal ladies carried a Spritzee that would waft a fragrance they liked.

pokemon:aromatisse.name: Aromatisse
pokemon:aromatisse.summary: Its scent is so overpowering that, unless a Trainer happens to really enjoy the smell, he or she will have a hard time walking alongside it.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Its scent is so overpowering that, unless a Trainer happens to really enjoy the smell, he or she will have a hard time walking alongside it.
It devises various scents, pleasant and unpleasant, and emits scents that its enemies dislike in order to gain an edge in battle.
The scents Aromatisse can produce range from sweet smells that bolster allies to foul smells that sap an opponent’s will to fight.
The scent that constantly emits from its fur is so powerful that this Pokémon’s companions will eventually lose their sense of smell.
It devises various scents, pleasant and unpleasant, and emits scents that its enemies dislike in order to gain an edge in battle.
Its scent is so overpowering that, unless a Trainer happens to really enjoy the smell, he or she will have a hard time walking alongside it.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Its scent is so overpowering that, unless a Trainer happens to really enjoy the smell, he or she will have a hard time walking alongside it.
